'''Bazurkah''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] who was leader of the [[Bazurkah Clan]] on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was insulted by the family of [[Bog'Ruhx]], then vengefully set out to kill that of Bog'Ruhx through posted bounties, beginning with a bounty of 2000 credits for Bog'Ruhx wanted dead on him. [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] secured the bounty while in Malastare's [[death stick factory]]. However, Bog'Ruhx also set a bounty for the exact same terms which was also claimed by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]-turned [[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunter]].
